svg.title: Workflow matrix: current methods and near-future goal, with YaqatW modes, familiarize step, color legend, and governance
svg.desc: Stage columns grouped into data collection, analysis, and writing. Analysis includes transcribe, de-identify, familiarize, code, categorize, evaluate; de-identify and familiarize form one reading pass. The current funded methods row is on top, a YaqatW modes layer in the middle, and the near-future goal row below. Purple text marks stages that call an external AI via API. A governance footer gives three data-handling rules and a color legend.
svg.text: Current project scope starts at data analysis,
AI is used only at the coding stage
YaqatW MS Word add-in modes used
Data collection and analysis happen together
1. Local text mining (Mining mode) runs on-device and may process raw, un-redacted data, nothing leaves the machine.
2. Raw audio is sent only to a private, self-hosted transcription AI (e.g., university-hosted Whisper), never to a commercial service.
3. Only de-identified text is ever sent to an external (commercial) AI, and only for coding. API is always set on no-retention (or lowest), no training basis.
Purple text = stage calls an AI via API
Dark text = human / manual or local (no API)
